description: Style Note Gear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of sandals from marvel. Featuring Spider-Man on its upper, this pair will easily capture his heart. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park. Product Details Blue sandals with Spider-Man design on upper Blue ankle straps with branding One piece foamy rubber upper and outsole Grooved outsole with branding Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteGear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of sandals from Marvel.
